channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Arsenal to Wear Gold Premier League Badge Next Season After Title Victory
item.description: Arsenal officially lifted the 2025/2026 Premier League trophy after beating Crystal Palace 2-1 at Selhurst Park, marking the club’s first league title in 22 years. Mikel Arteta’s side had already secu...

item.title: Analyst says Bruce Springsteen’s tour demonstrates a model of effective political resistance to Trump
item.description: An opinion analysis highlights how Bruce Springsteen’s current concert tour has been interpreted as a form of political resistance to Donald Trump, according to labor journalist Steven Greenhouse writ...

item.title: PTI says meeting with Mohsin Naqvi was held to discuss terrorism and law and order situation in KP
item.description: Pakistan Tehreek-i-Insaf (PTI) has confirmed that Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Chief Minister Sohail Afridi and party chairman Barrister Gohar Ali Khan recently held a meeting with Interior Minister Mohsin Naqv...

item.title: Vietnam emerges as a top-value travel destination for Australians amid rising demand for affordable holidays
item.description: Vietnam has rapidly become one of the most popular overseas destinations for Australian travellers, with short-term trips more than doubling since 2016. According to Australian Bureau of Statistics da...

item.title: New studies question whether NAD+ levels naturally decline with age in humans
item.description: New research has raised doubts about one of the key claims behind the booming market for NAD+ anti-ageing supplements. NAD+, short for nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide, is a molecule involved in cell...

item.title: Australian councils face criticism over fines and removal of belongings targeting rough sleepers
item.description: Across Australia, local councils are increasingly taking enforcement-based approaches to managing homelessness, including issuing fines, dismantling encampments and confiscating the belongings of peop...

item.title: Oil markets approach heightened risk as US–Iran tensions and supply constraints intensify
item.description: Global oil markets are edging closer to a critical threshold amid escalating geopolitical tensions and tightening supply conditions, with analysts warning that a US–Iran agreement may be urgently need...

item.title: Legal analysis questions Registrar of Political Parties’ warning against CHADEMA and limits of deregistration powers
item.description: This opinion piece examines a recent letter from the Registrar of Political Parties in Tanzania issued to CHADEMA, which gave the opposition party 14 days to explain alleged misconduct, including accu...

item.title: Residents advised to take precautions during Gauteng water disruptions and tanker supply periods
item.description: Residents across parts of Gauteng have been urged to exercise caution and maintain strict hygiene practices during upcoming water supply disruptions linked to major maintenance work by Rand Water. The...

item.title: Tinubu Defeats Osifo in APC Presidential Primary, Extends Olive Branch After Victory
item.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu has emerged victorious in the All Progressives Congress (APC) presidential primary for the 2027 general election, securing a massive win over his only challenger, Stanley O...

item.title: Abubakar Malami Confirmed as ADC Governorship Candidate for Kebbi State Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: Former Attorney-General of the Federation, Abubakar Malami, has been officially confirmed as the governorship candidate of the African Democratic Congress (ADC) for Kebbi State ahead of the 2027 gener...

item.title: US skateboarder Jason Vanporppal finishes 6,400km fundraising journey in Cape Town for Uganda skatepark project
item.description: American skateboarder Jason Vanporppal has successfully completed an ambitious cross-continental journey, arriving in Cape Town after travelling more than 6,400 kilometres across Africa. His mission, ...

item.title: Kitchener police lay weapons charges after seizing loaded handgun from Hamilton man
item.description: Police in Kitchener have charged a Hamilton man following a weapons investigation that resulted in the seizure of a loaded handgun. According to the report published by CTV News Kitchener on May 24, 2...

item.title: Nintendo Life Poll Invites Players to Rate Yoshi and the Mysterious Book on Switch 2
item.description: Nintendo Life has published a community poll inviting readers to rate the newly released Switch 2 title, Yoshi and the Mysterious Book, following its recent launch. The game, starring T. Yoshisaur Mun...

item.title: Wind and solar surpass gas in global electricity generation for the first time in April 2026
item.description: According to a new analysis from the independent energy think tank Ember, April 2026 marked a historic milestone in global electricity generation. For the first time, wind and solar power together pro...

item.title: China sends three astronauts on crewed mission supporting lunar exploration programme
item.description: China has successfully launched a three-crew space flight as part of its long-term ambitions to explore and eventually reach the Moon. According to reports from Agence France-Presse, the mission lifte...

item.title: Prolonged Bell internet outage disrupts Bridgetown Legion operations and local residents
item.description: A prolonged internet outage affecting some Bell Canada customers in Bridgetown, Nova Scotia, has left a local Royal Canadian Legion branch and nearby residents without service for more than a week. Th...

item.title: Liverpool secure Champions League place after draw with Brentford as Mohamed Salah and Andy Robertson bid farewell at Anfield
item.description: Liverpool secured qualification for next season’s Champions League after a tense 1-1 draw against Brentford at Anfield on the final day of the Premier League season. Curtis Jones gave Liverpool the le...

item.title: Arsenal clinch Premier League title with 2-1 victory over Crystal Palace on final day
item.description: Arsenal have officially been crowned Premier League champions after sealing a 2-1 win over Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park on the final day of the season. The victory confirmed a remarkable campaign u...

item.title: US and Iran Advance Framework Agreement to End Recent Conflict and Address Key Disputes
item.description: The United States and Iran are currently negotiating a memorandum of understanding aimed at transforming a recent ceasefire into a more durable peace arrangement following weeks of conflict. While bot...
